computation: (Close_T / Close_T-252) - 1
missing_action: Mark metric None if < 252 days of history → stock excluded at eligibility gate

computation: (Close_T / Close_T-126) - 1
missing_action: None if < 126 days → sub-metric missing, weight redistributed

primary_source: NSE Security-wise Price Volume Archive (manual download per symbol)
computation: (Close_T / Close_T-1260)^(1/5) - 1
missing_action: None if listing < 5 years; score from remaining sub-metrics

display_name: Peer-Relative Price Strength (percentile rank of 1Y return vs. peer group)
raw_fields: return_1y of stock vs. all peer group members
primary_source: Derived from Bhavcopy price history (computed internally)
computation: Rank of stock's 1Y return within peer group / (n_peers+1) × 100
missing_action: None if return_1y is None

display_name: Drawdown Recovery Score (% recovered from 52-week low)
computation: (Close - 52W_Low) / (52W_High - 52W_Low) × 100
missing_action: None if 52W range is zero (new listing or circuit-locked)

display_name: 1Y Forward EPS/Revenue Consensus View (analyst estimate growth %)
primary_source: Trendlyne Premium API — forward estimates field
secondary_source: Tickertape Pro (manual export CSV) — fallback for small-caps
computation: Average of FY+1 EPS growth % and FY+1 Revenue growth % estimates
missing_action: None for stocks with no analyst coverage (common in small/micro-cap); weight redistributed

primary_source: Price: NSE Bhavcopy. EPS_TTM: NSE/BSE XBRL Quarterly Results
secondary_source: Screener.in export CSV (manual) for EPS TTM
frequency: Price: daily. EPS: quarterly refresh (post results)
computation: Close / EPS_TTM; then invert for percentile (lower PE = higher score)
missing_action: None if EPS_TTM ≤ 0 (loss-making); card weight redistributed

primary_source: Price: NSE Bhavcopy. BV: BSE XBRL balance sheet filings
computation: Close / (Net Worth / Shares Outstanding); inverted for score
missing_action: None if net worth negative (distressed)

primary_source: CFO: BSE/NSE XBRL Cash Flow Statement (quarterly)
computation: Market Cap / CFO_TTM; inverted for score
missing_action: None if CFO ≤ 0

primary_source: Market cap: NSE Bhavcopy × shares. Debt/Cash/EBITDA: XBRL filings
computation: (Market Cap + Total Debt - Cash) / EBITDA_TTM; inverted for score
missing_action: None if EBITDA ≤ 0

display_name: Historical Valuation Band (current PE vs. 5Y median PE)
primary_source: Derived: PE_5Y_MEDIAN computed from rolling historical EPS + price
computation: PE_5Y_Median / PE_Current × 100 (ratio > 100 means stock is cheap vs history)
missing_action: None if < 3 years of PE history

primary_source: CFO + CAPEX: NSE/BSE XBRL Cash Flow Statement
computation: (CFO_TTM - CAPEX_TTM) / Market_Cap × 100
missing_action: None if FCF negative

display_name: Intrinsic Value Gap (% discount of price to IV)
primary_source: Computed internally (Graham Number or DCF using XBRL inputs)
computation: (IV_Estimate - Close) / IV_Estimate × 100 (positive = stock is cheap)
missing_action: None if IV model inputs incomplete (< 2 years of earnings)

primary_source: Price: NSE Bhavcopy. BV: XBRL balance sheet
computation: Close / BVPS; inverted for score (lower P/B preferred)
missing_action: None if net worth negative

display_name: ROE-Adjusted P/B (P/B ÷ ROE — lower is better)
computation: P/B ÷ ROE (analagous to PEG for banks); inverted for score
missing_action: None if ROE ≤ 0

computation: Close / EPS_TTM; inverted
missing_action: None if EPS ≤ 0

display_name: Historical P/B Band (current P/B vs. 5Y median)
primary_source: Derived from rolling historical BVPS + price
computation: PB_5Y_Median / PB_Current × 100
missing_action: None if < 3 years P/B history

display_name: Fair P/B Gap (% discount to justified P/B = ROE/COE)
primary_source: Computed from XBRL ROE + assumed COE
computation: (ROE / COE - PB_Current) / (ROE / COE) × 100; positive = cheap
missing_action: None if ROE ≤ 0
None if < 3 years of annual results

computation: (EPS_FY0 / EPS_FY-3)^(1/3) - 1; None if base year EPS ≤ 0
missing_action: None if base EPS ≤ 0 or < 3 years of data

computation: (Rev_TTM / Rev_PriorTTM) - 1
missing_action: None if < 2 years of quarterly data

computation: (EPS_TTM / EPS_PriorTTM) - 1
missing_action: None if base EPS ≤ 0

display_name: Peer-Relative Growth Rank (percentile of Rev CAGR 3Y in peer group)
computation: Rank of stock's Rev CAGR 3Y within peer group
missing_action: None if rev_cagr_3y is None

display_name: Growth Stability (1 - CoV of annual revenue growth over 5Y)
computation: 1 - (StdDev of 4 YoY growth rates / Mean of 4 YoY growth rates); clipped [0,1]
missing_action: None if < 4 annual observations

computation: (Advances_Q0 / Advances_Q-4) - 1
missing_action: None if < 4 quarters of data

computation: (Deposits_Q0 / Deposits_Q-4) - 1
missing_action: None if < 4 quarters

computation: (NII_TTM / NII_PriorTTM) - 1
missing_action: None if < 4 quarters

computation: (FeeIncome_TTM / FeeIncome_PriorTTM) - 1
missing_action: None if < 4 quarters

computation: (PAT_TTM / PAT_PriorTTM) - 1; None if base ≤ 0
missing_action: None if base PAT ≤ 0

display_name: Growth Stability (1 - CoV of NII growth over 5Y)
computation: 1 - CoV of 4 annual NII growth rates
missing_action: None if < 4 annual observations

raw_fields: AUM (Assets Under Management) from quarterly investor presentations
primary_source: Company quarterly investor presentations / BSE filings (Corporate Announcement)
computation: (AUM_Q0 / AUM_Q-4) - 1
missing_action: Fallback to advances_growth if AUM not separately disclosed

raw_fields: EBIT (annual), CAPITAL_EMPLOYED = Total Assets - Current Liabilities
computation: Median of (EBIT / Capital Employed × 100) over 3 years
missing_action: None if < 2 annual observations

computation: EBITDA_TTM / Revenue_TTM × 100
missing_action: None if EBITDA not derivable (banks/financials use Template B/C)

computation: CFO_TTM / PAT_TTM (ratio ≥ 1.0 indicates clean earnings)
missing_action: None if PAT ≤ 0 or CFO statement missing

display_name: Margin Trend Score (EBITDA margin direction over 3Y)
computation: Linear regression slope of annual EBITDA margins; normalized 0-100 within peer group
missing_action: None if < 2 annual margin observations

computation: PAT_TTM / Avg_Total_Assets × 100
missing_action: None if total assets unavailable

display_name: FCF Consistency (% of years with positive FCF over 5Y)
computation: Count(FCF > 0) / 5 × 100
missing_action: None if < 3 annual cash flow observations

computation: PAT_TTM / Avg_Total_Assets × 100 (RBI standard: good banks > 1%)
missing_action: None if assets unavailable

computation: PAT_TTM / Avg_Equity × 100
missing_action: None if equity ≤ 0

primary_source: NSE/BSE XBRL Quarterly Results + balance sheet
computation: NII_TTM / Avg_Interest_Earning_Assets × 100
missing_action: Fallback: NIM from investor presentation if XBRL insufficient

computation: Opex_TTM / Net_Revenue_TTM × 100; inverted for score
missing_action: None if net revenue ≤ 0

primary_source: NSE/BSE XBRL quarterly notes to accounts / bank IR presentations
computation: Cumulative_Provisions / Gross_NPA × 100
missing_action: None if GNPA = 0 (no NPA) → set to 100 (perfect coverage)

display_name: Credit Cost Ratio % (provisions / average advances) — lower is better
computation: Provisions_TTM / Avg_Advances × 100; inverted for score
missing_action: None if advances data missing

primary_source: Computed — same IV model as Valuation card iv_gap
computation: max(0, (IV - Close) / IV × 100); same as iv_gap; both cards share one canonical IV
missing_action: None if IV not computable

computation: RSI = Wilder RSI(14). Score: RSI 25-40 → 100, 40-50 → 75, 50-60 → 50, 60-70 → 30, >70 or <20 → 0. Non-monotonic; panic zone (<20) treated same as overbought.
missing_action: None if < 14 days of price data

computation: (Close - SMA200) / SMA200 × 100; negative means below 200DMA (entry zone; scored higher)
missing_action: None if < 200 days of history

computation: (Close - SMA50) / SMA50 × 100; negative preferred (entry forming below MA)
missing_action: None if < 50 days of history

primary_source: NSE Security-wise Price Volume & Delivery Archive
secondary_source: NSE UDiFF Bhavcopy supplemental delivery file
computation: Delivery% = Deliverable_Qty / Traded_Qty × 100. Score: 20D avg delivery% vs. 60D avg delivery%; rising delivery% on price support = higher score
missing_action: None if delivery data not available for that symbol/series

raw_fields: CLOSE_PRICE of stock, CLOSE_PRICE of Nifty 500 index
primary_source: NSE Bhavcopy (stock) + NSE Index EOD data (Nifty 500)
computation: RS = Close / Nifty500_Close. RS_Turn = slope of RS over last 5 weeks vs prior 5 weeks; positive slope change = positive score
missing_action: None if Nifty 500 index data unavailable

computation: ATR_Ratio = ATR(20) / ATR(60); lower ratio = tighter base = higher score. Score = (1 - ATR_Ratio) × 100, clipped [0,100]
missing_action: None if < 60 days of OHLC data

primary_source: Computed — same fair_value_gap model as Valuation card
computation: Same as fair_value_gap; both cards share one canonical fair P/B estimate
missing_action: None if ROE ≤ 0

display_name: Volume Confirmation (20D avg volume vs. 60D avg volume)
computation: 20D_Avg_Vol / 60D_Avg_Vol; ratio > 1 means rising volume = higher score
missing_action: None if < 60 days data

display_name: Drawdown Normalization (% recovered from 52W low; same as Performance card)
computation: (Close - 52W_Low) / (52W_High - 52W_Low) × 100; same field as drawdown_recovery
missing_action: None if range is zero

display_name: Promoter Pledge Risk (% of promoter holding pledged)
primary_source: BSE Shareholding Pattern (quarterly filing — SHP format)
secondary_source: NSE Shareholding Pattern page (same data, alternate download)
computation: Pledged_Shares / Total_Promoter_Shares × 100; higher pledge % = higher risk raw value = lower score
missing_action: Assume 0% if not disclosed (treat as clean); flag in audit log

primary_source: NSE ASM List (official downloadable PDF/CSV) + NSE GSM List
computation: GSM Stage 6 = raw_risk 100; ASM Stage 4 = 90; ASM Stage 3 = 70; ASM Stage 2 = 50; ASM Stage 1 = 30; None = 0. Hard override: any ASM/GSM → card score capped ≤ 20
missing_action: Assume 0 if not on any list; MUST refresh before each run

primary_source: Credit rating: CRISIL/ICRA/CARE public rating disclosures via BSE announcements
computation: Composite: D/E > 3 → +30; Interest Coverage < 1.5 → +40; rating downgrade in last 6M → +30. Clipped [0,100]
missing_action: Use financial ratio proxy if credit rating unavailable

display_name: Accounting Quality Stress (modified Beneish M-Score components)
raw_fields: DSRI (receivables), GMI (gross margin), AQI (asset quality), SGI (sales growth), DEPI, SGAI, LVGI (leverage), TATA (accruals)
primary_source: NSE/BSE XBRL Annual P&L + Balance Sheet
computation: Beneish M-Score 8-variable model; M > -1.78 signals potential manipulation (higher M = higher risk)
missing_action: None if < 2 years of annual data; weight redistributed

display_name: Liquidity/Manipulation Risk (thin volume + bid-ask spread proxy)
primary_source: NSE Bhavcopy traded value. Impact cost: NSE index eligibility reports
computation: Raw_risk = 0 if 30D avg turnover > ₹5Cr; 30 if ₹1-5Cr; 70 if ₹25L-1Cr; 100 if < ₹25L. Plus +20 if stock is T2T (trade-to-trade) segment
missing_action: Use market cap as liquidity proxy if turnover unavailable

primary_source: BSE Corporate Announcements (auditor change, SEBI orders) — manual/quarterly scan
computation: Auditor resignation/qualification in 12M → +50; SEBI/exchange penalty → +30; management fraud news → +20. Clipped [0,100]
missing_action: Assume 0 if no adverse events found; manual verification recommended for watchlist stocks

primary_source: NSE/BSE XBRL Quarterly Results (notes to accounts) / Bank IR presentations
computation: Raw_risk = GNPA% × 5 + NNPA% × 10 (NNPA penalized more as it's net of provisions). Clipped [0,100]
missing_action: None if NPA data not disclosed; flag as data gap; default to peer median

computation: Raw_risk = max(0, 75 - PCR%) × 1.33; PCR < 75% increases risk. Inverted: lower PCR = higher risk raw value = lower score
missing_action: None if PCR not disclosed; treat as risk = 50 (moderate)

primary_source: RBI ALM returns (not public) → proxy: short-term borrowings / total borrowings from XBRL balance sheet
secondary_source: NBFC quarterly investor presentations (ALM disclosures post RBI circular)
computation: Raw_risk = (CP_Due_6M + ST_Borrowings) / Total_Borrowings × 100; higher short-term dependency = higher risk. Clipped [0,100]
missing_action: None if breakdown unavailable; use credit rating outlook as proxy

primary_source: NSE/BSE XBRL quarterly notes + Bank/NBFC IR presentations
computation: RBI minimum for banks = 11.5% (including CCB). Raw_risk = max(0, 14 - CRAR) × 10. CRAR ≥ 14% → risk = 0. Clipped [0,100]
missing_action: None if CRAR not disclosed; flag as data gap

primary_source: Bank/NBFC IR quarterly presentations (disclosed explicitly) + XBRL annex
computation: Slippage_Ratio = Fresh_NPA_Added_TTM / Avg_Advances × 100; inverted for score
missing_action: None if not disclosed; proxy = GNPA change / avg advances

primary_source: BSE Corporate Announcements + RBI press releases (public)
computation: RBI penalty > ₹1Cr → +40; auditor change → +30; SEBI order → +20; promoter pledge > 20% → +10. Clipped [0,100]
missing_action: Assume 0 if no adverse events

primary_source: NSE ASM/GSM Lists + Rating agency disclosures via BSE announcements
computation: Same staging logic as Template A asm_gsm_risk. Rating downgrade to sub-investment grade → +30 additional
missing_action: Assume 0 if not on any list
